title: Uniface 10: Changes in the JavaScript API
breadcrumbs: What's New in Uniface 10 Compared to Uniface 9
Uniface 10: Changes in the JavaScript API
text: Uniface 10: Changes in the JavaScript API The Uniface JavaScript API has been enhanced with new and changed APIs. Table 1. New APIs API Change Introduced uniface.ValidationError JavaScript object for accessing information about a server-side validation error 10.3.03 uniface.FieldErrorContext JavaScript object for accessing information required in the showError and clearError web triggers 10.3.03 uniface.View JavaScript object that represents a view (layout) of a DSP component instance. Provides functions for showing, hiding, and deleting views. 10.2.02 createView Create a View object to represent a view of a DSP component instance. 10.2.02 getView() Get the specified view of the component instance. 10.2.02 getViews Returns an array of uniface.View objects representing the views of a component instance. 10.2.02 uniface.datastore Provides create, update, retrieve, and delete access to browser-based databases. 10.2.01 getData() Serialize the component data from the specified component instance into a JSON stream. 10.2.01 setData() Load component data from a JSON stream into the specified component instance. 10.2.01 focus() Gives the field focus. 10.2.01 hasFocus() Checks whether the field has focus. 10.2.01 getDeclarativeSyntax() Returns a JavaScript object containing the field syntax properties, as defined in the field's definition. 10.2.01 getError() Returns a uniface.SyntaxError object for the field, if a syntax error occurred. 10.2.01 uniface.SyntaxError Error object returned by getError , which contains the exceptionCode, error message, and valueInError. 10.2.01 uniface.Label New uniface.Label object. The setValue and getValue functions can be used to set and get the text of the label. 10.2.01 Table 2. Changed APIs API Change Introduced uniface.Instance The following functions have been added: createView getView getViews() 10.2.02 uniface.Field The following functions have been added: focus() hasFocus() getDeclarativeSyntax getError getLabel 10.2.01 activate() Returns a JavaScript Promise object. 10.2.01 createInstance() Returns a JavaScript Promise object. 10.2.01 uniface.Occurrence The following functions have been added: getLabel 10.2.01 Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
